clips.note: Textualist and living constitutionalist clash over Article II vesting and purpose.
Broad opening statements on precedent, federalism, liberty, and jurisdiction.
Civil libertarian flips to reverse, prioritizing democratic accountability over bureaucratic stability.
Minimalist flips to reverse, taking the process formalist jurisdictional off-ramp.
Living constitutionalist and originalist debate evolving purpose versus original public meaning.
Intense debate on stare decisis, jurisdiction, and federalism merits.
Pragmatist and textualist clash over administrability and litigation burdens.
